entries.display_name: Chorus Community Health Plans (fka Children's Community Health Plan)
entries.reason: Official public base is documented but not reachable as an importable FHIR service.
entries.note: Official client code identifies https://cchp.healthlx.com:9091/fhir, but its capability endpoint returned no usable response and the portal proxy returned HTTP 502 at review time.

entries.reason: Official portal requires a user token and no open public FHIR base is confirmed.
entries.note: Official First Medical developer portal lists Practitioner, PractitionerRole, and Location APIs, but registration, client credentials, user-token access, and production approval are required.

entries.source_detail: CMS SMA Endpoint Directory Provider Directory status TBD
entries.reason: CMS SMA Endpoint Directory lists Provider Directory as not yet started/TBD.
entries.note: CMS SMA Endpoint Directory lists Puerto Rico Provider Directory status as TBD and provides no production base, capability statement, FHIR version, or resource list.
